criteria.name: Thesis Clarity
criteria.description: Is the thesis clearly stated in the introduction?

criteria.name: Evidence & Support
criteria.description: Are claims supported with evidence and citations?

criteria.name: Structure & Organization
criteria.description: Is the paper logically organized with clear sections?

criteria.name: Grammar & Mechanics
criteria.description: Is the writing free of grammatical errors?

criteria.name: Conclusion
criteria.description: Does the conclusion effectively summarize and reflect?
